description: Russia slams Kyiv with mass drone attack. Russia launched a mass drone attack against Kyiv late in the evening on May 2. The Air Force began warning that swarms of Russian drones were moving towards the capital shortly before 10 p.m. local time.

description: Peru launches investigation into citizens allegedly trafficked to fight Russia's war in Ukraine. Relatives of allegedly trafficked individuals reported that their loved ones received misleading job offers along with promises of financial rewards. But once in Russia, they were forced into combat operations.

title: Explosions reported

title_uk: Повідомляється про вибухи
description: The psychological obstacle course at the Training Center of the SBS of the ZSU Smuga has 14 obstacles. It simulates conditions close to combat: FPV-drone attacks and countering them, evacuation of wounded with the use of NRC, constant noise, explosions, smoke, limited visibility, physical exertion and working in a group under pressure. The first to cross the line are officers from various divisions who arrived at the SBS Center on...
description_en: The psychological obstacle course at the Training Center of the SBS of the ZSU Smuga has 14 obstacles. It simulates conditions close to combat: FPV-drone attacks and countering them, evacuation of wounded with the use of NRC, constant noise, explosions, smoke, limited visibility, physical exertion and working in a group under pressure. The first to cross the line are officers from various divisions who arrived at the SBS Center on...
description_uk: Психологічна смуга перешкод у Навчальному центрі СБС ЗСУ Смуга налічує 14 перешкод. Вона моделює умови, наближені до бойових: атаки FPV-дронів і протидію їм, евакуацію поранених із застосуванням НРК, постійний шум, вибухи, дим, обмежену видимість, фізичне навантаження та роботу в групі під тиском. Першими смугу проходять офіцери з різних підрозділів, які прибули до НЦ СБС на...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
title_en: Kyiv: Casualties reported
title_uk: Київ: повідомляється про постраждалих
description: General Staff: Russia has lost 1,332,950 troops in Ukraine since Feb. 24, 2022. Russia has lost around 1,332,950 troops in Ukraine since the beginning of its full-scale invasion on Feb. 24, 2022, the General Staff of the Armed Forces of Ukraine reported on May 2. The number includes 1,240 casualties that Russian forces suffered over the past day.
description_en: General Staff: Russia has lost 1,332,950 troops in Ukraine since Feb. 24, 2022. Russia has lost around 1,332,950 troops in Ukraine since the beginning of its full-scale invasion on Feb. 24, 2022, the General Staff of the Armed Forces of Ukraine reported on May 2. The number includes 1,240 casualties that Russian forces suffered over the past day.

title: Kherson: 2 killed, 7 injured
title_en: Kherson: 2 killed, 7 injured
title_uk: Херсон: 2 загиблих, 7 поранених
description: At least 2 killed, 7 injured after Russian drone hits civilian bus in Kherson. At least two people were killed and seven others injured after a Russian drone struck a civilian bus in Kherson in the early hours of May 2.
description_en: At least 2 killed, 7 injured after Russian drone hits civilian bus in Kherson. At least two people were killed and seven others injured after a Russian drone struck a civilian bus in Kherson in the early hours of May 2.
description_uk: At least 2 killed, 7 injured after Russian drone hits civilian bus in Kherson. At least two people were killed and seven others injured after a Russian drone struck a civilian bus in Kherson in the early hours of May 2.

title: Mykolaiv: Drone strike near civilians
title_en: Mykolaiv: Drone strike near civilians
title_uk: Миколаїв: обстріл безпілотників поблизу мирних жителів
description: Seven victims in Kherson after a Russian FPV-drone attack on a regular city bus are being provided with the necessary medical assistance. Unfortunately, two people died. My condolences to family and friends. All the victims during the attack were civilians, and the Russians certainly understood that. In fact, such a cruel safari is carried out on people every day in our frontline and border communities. In Kharkiv, a drone hit a residential...
description_en: Seven victims in Kherson after a Russian FPV-drone attack on a regular city bus are being provided with the necessary medical assistance. Unfortunately, two people died. My condolences to family and friends. All the victims during the attack were civilians, and the Russians certainly understood that. In fact, such a cruel safari is carried out on people every day in our frontline and border communities. In Kharkiv, a drone hit a residential...
description_uk: Сімом постраждалим у Херсоні після російського удару FPV-дроном по звичайній міській маршрутці надають необхідну медичну допомогу. На жаль, двоє людей загинуло. Мої співчуття рідним та близьким. Усі постраждалі під час атаки – цивільні, і росіяни точно це розуміли. Фактично таке жорстоке сафарі на людей щодня в наших прифронтових і прикордонних громадах. У Харкові дрон вдарив по житловій...

title: As a result of this April, our long-range sanctions reached a new...
title_en: As a result of this April, our long-range sanctions reached a new...
title_uk: У результаті цього квітня наші довгострокові санкції досягли нового...
description: As a result of this April, our long-range sanctions reached a new level in terms of three components: reduction of Russian oil profits, distance and intensity of sanctions. It is important that not only the object itself is achieved, as defined by the combat mission, but also the downtime of the object is increased, or at least a noticeable reduction in its operation. According to the most modest estimates, the aggressor state...
description_en: As a result of this April, our long-range sanctions reached a new level in terms of three components: reduction of Russian oil profits, distance and intensity of sanctions. It is important that not only the object itself is achieved, as defined by the combat mission, but also the downtime of the object is increased, or at least a noticeable reduction in its operation. According to the most modest estimates, the aggressor state...
description_uk: За підсумками цього квітня наші далекобійні санкції вийшли на новий рівень за трьома компонентами: скорочення російського нафтового прибутку, дистанція та інтенсивність санкцій. Важливо, що не тільки досягається сам обʼєкт, як це визначено бойовим завданням, але і збільшується час простою обʼєкта або принаймні відчутне скорочення його роботи. За найбільш скромними оцінками, держава-агресор...
